OptionDesc_Chain_RawResources_Bind: Toggles the display of base ingredients in the crafting menu and pinned recipes
OptionDesc_Chain_CraftingHelper_Bind: Opens the crafting helper menu on your PDA
OptionDesc_Chain_UpCraft_Bind: Increases the amount of bulk crafted items
OptionDesc_Chain_DownCraft_Bind: Lowers the amount of bulk crafted items
